mnemonics.title: DNS Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: Donuts Usually Come Glazed: Domain → TLD → Organizational Domain → Subdomains

mnemonics.title: LDAP Components
mnemonics.content: DIB = Directory Information Base (data) + DIT = Directory Information Tree (structure)

acronyms.usage: Unique resource identification in distributed systems

visualTips.visualization: Imagine nested Russian dolls - root server → TLD → authoritative server

analogies.analogy: Like a phone book that also lists business hours and services
